Reshape a legacy (pre-2025) StudentGrowth subgroup sheet to 2025 trends shape

Source: R/fetch_spr.R
sgp_legacy_trends.Rd

The redesigned 2025 StudentGrowthTrends sheet is the successor to the legacy StudentGrowth sheet, which is long-by-subject with one row per entity per student group. This pivots ELA/Math wide to match the 2025 output.

Usage

sgp_legacy_trends(df, level)

Arguments

df

Output of fetch_spr_data for a legacy StudentGrowth sheet.

level

"school" or "district" (selects the entity median column).

Value

Data frame matching the 2025 type = "trends" output, plus ela_met_target/math_met_target.

Details

Two legacy quirks are handled: (1) the subgroup column header varies (SubGroup/StudentGroup in the district file, mislabeled SchoolYear in the school file), so it is identified structurally as the column immediately before subject; (2) legacy sheets carry a MetTarget flag ("Met Standard"/"Not Met"/...) rather than the 2025 growth/suppression *_category. The *_category columns are therefore NA and the real MetTarget value is preserved verbatim in ela_met_target/math_met_target.
